name: robot-markdown-companion
description: Read-only documentation preview plus variable/enum/typed return structure hovers for Robot Framework files.

commands.title: Robot Companion: Open Current Documentation Block

robotDocPreview.enableCodeLens.description: Show CodeLens above each [Documentation] block to open rendered preview.

robotDocPreview.enableHoverPreview.description: Show rendered documentation preview on hover within documentation lines.

robotDocPreview.enableEnumValueHover.description: Show enum value hints when hovering named argument values in Robot keyword calls.

robotDocPreview.enableEnumArgumentFallba.description: Allow lower-confidence enum/type-hint fallback by argument name across keywords when no direct keyword argument mapping is found.

robotDocPreview.enableVariableValueHover.description: Show variable value hover when a local Set Variable assignment is found in the same test/keyword before the cursor.

robotDocPreview.enableTypedVariableCompl.description: Show type-matched local return-variable suggestions in named argument value positions (for example `${bp}` for `businesspartner=`).

robotDocPreview.enableReturnValueHover.description: Show structured return hints when hovering a variable assigned from a keyword call.

robotDocPreview.enableReturnExplorer.description: Enable the Robot Return Explorer side view and keep it synced with the cursor.

robotDocPreview.autoSyncSelection.description: Synchronize the side preview with the cursor position in active .robot files.

robotDocPreview.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for reparsing documentation after edits.

robotDocPreview.hoverLineLimit.description: Maximum number of documentation lines shown inside hover preview before truncation.

robotDocPreview.enumHoverMaxEnums.description: Maximum number of matching enum types shown in enum hover.

robotDocPreview.enumHoverMaxMembers.description: Maximum number of enum members shown per enum in enum hover.

robotDocPreview.returnHoverMaxDepth.description: Maximum nested option depth shown in return hover (1 = top-level fields + one nested level).

robotDocPreview.returnPreviewMaxDepth.description: Maximum nested option depth shown in the Robot Return Explorer side view.

robotDocPreview.returnMaxFieldsPerType.description: Maximum number of fields shown per return object type.

robotDocPreview.returnTechnicalMaxDepth.description: Maximum nested depth shown in the technical (developer) section of return explorer.

robotDocPreview.returnTechnicalMaxFields.description: Maximum fields shown per type in the technical (developer) section.

robotDocPreview.variableHoverLineLimit.description: Maximum number of Set Variable value lines shown inside variable hover before truncation.
